response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the search matches, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Return exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call education_search, education_availability, and education_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the course-planning brief, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: search Downtown for "Public Speaking Workshop"; check whether "Public Speaking Workshop" is available on 2026-11-19 in Downtown; and list active courses in Downtown. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Keep the final answer to exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
